en.title: Best 3D Printers 2026
en.description: Ranked by print quality, speed, multi-color capability, software, and value — from $218 entry-level bed slingers to $1,499 enclosed CoreXY flagships.

zh-tw.title: 最佳 3D 印表機 2026
zh-tw.description: 從台幣七千的入門款到台幣四萬五的封閉式 CoreXY 旗艦，依據列印品質、速度、多色支援、軟體生態與整體 CP 值綜合排名。

en.description: Enclosed CoreXY with AMS 2 Pro four-color drying system, servo extruder with 70% more grip than P1S, and 500 mm/s print speeds — the new mid-range default.

zh-tw.description: 封閉式 CoreXY 旗艦中價位機種，搭配 AMS 2 Pro 四色乾燥系統，伺服馬達擠出器比 P1S 多 70% 抓力，500 mm/s 列印速度，是 2026 年中階消費級的新標竿。

en.description: Flagship enclosed CoreXY with hardened steel hotend, lidar first-layer scan, on-board AI failure detection, and AMS for four-color carbon-fiber and engineering filaments.

zh-tw.description: 封閉式 CoreXY 旗艦機種，硬化鋼噴頭、雷達首層掃描、AI 列印失敗偵測、AMS 四色系統，碳纖維和工程塑料列印的家用機標竿。

en.description: Large-format 350×320×325mm IDEX dual-extruder flagship with high-flow hotend at 600 mm/s, BirdsEye top-view alignment camera, AI nozzle camera, and optional 10W or 40W laser plus digital cutter modules.

zh-tw.description: 大尺寸 350×320×325mm IDEX 雙獨立擠出器旗艦，高流量噴頭 600 mm/s 列印，BirdsEye 頂視校正相機加 AI 噴頭相機即時偵測列印失敗，選配 10W 或 40W 雷射模組與切割模組，一台機器同時做 3D 列印、雷射雕刻與切割。

en.description: All-steel exoskeleton enclosed CoreXY with active 55°C chamber heating, load-cell first-layer calibration, open-source firmware, and full upgrade path from MK4S.

zh-tw.description: 全鋼外骨骼封閉式 CoreXY，主動加熱腔體 55 度，load cell 首層校正，開源韌體，MK4S 老用戶可用升級套件改裝，是開源派的旗艦答案。

en.description: Enclosed CoreXY workhorse with active carbon filtration, AMS-ready, and 500 mm/s speeds at the lowest entry into the Bambu ecosystem.

zh-tw.description: 封閉式 CoreXY 入門款，內建活性碳過濾，可加購 AMS 升級多色，500 mm/s 列印速度，是進入 Bambu 生態系最便宜的方式。

en.description: Bed-slinger cartesian workhorse with Nextruder, input shaping at 300 mm/s, OctoPrint-class reliability, and the largest open-source community in consumer 3D printing.

zh-tw.description: Cartesian 移動床身機型主力款，Nextruder 直驅擠出器，輸入整形可達 300 mm/s，可靠度業界第一，開源社群與配件最完整。

en.description: Large-format 350×350×350mm CoreXY with active 60°C chamber, step-servo motors, and CFS multi-color system supporting four AMS units chained.

zh-tw.description: 大尺寸 CoreXY 機型，350×350×350mm 列印空間，主動腔體加熱 60 度，step-servo 步進伺服馬達，CFS 多色系統最多可串接四組 AMS。

en.description: Enclosed CoreXY at $319 with all-metal hotend, vibration compensation, and Klipper-based firmware — the budget category-breaker of 2026.

zh-tw.description: 封閉式 CoreXY 平價殺手，全金屬噴頭、振動補償、Klipper 韌體，這個價位之前根本沒有封閉 CoreXY 選項，2026 年最佳預算破壞王。

en.description: Massive 420×420×500mm open-frame CoreXY-adjacent with 600 mm/s speeds and ACE Pro multi-color system — largest consumer multicolor printer.

zh-tw.description: 420×420×500mm 超大列印空間的開放式機種，600 mm/s 高速列印，ACE Pro 多色系統，是消費級裡能買到體積最大的多色機。

en.description: Pre-assembled Voron 2.4 clone with 700 mm/s top speed, native Klipper, open-source hardware, and 350×350×345mm build volume — the maker's enthusiast pick.

zh-tw.description: 預組裝的 Voron 2.4 開源複製機，最高 700 mm/s 列印速度，原生 Klipper 韌體，350×350×345mm 列印空間，是 maker 玩家的客製化首選。

en.description: Entry-level cartesian bed slinger at $218 with CR Touch auto-leveling, Sprite direct extruder, and 250 mm/s speeds — the safest first 3D printer.

zh-tw.description: 入門款 cartesian 移動床身機，CR Touch 自動調平，Sprite 直驅擠出器，250 mm/s 列印速度，是新手第一台 3D 印表機最穩的選擇。

references.title: The Best 3D Printers for Home, Workshop or Business in 2026
Bambu Lab P2S review: Refreshing a best seller
Prusa MK4S Review: Precisely Right
Prusa CORE One: Technical Specifications and Pricing
Anycubic Kobra 3 Max Combo Review: Color to the Max
Sovol SV08 Max review: Monster printer
Creality Ender 3 V3 SE Review: Over 200 mm/s for Less Than $200

en.commentary:
The Bambu Lab P2S Combo takes the top spot, and the gap to second place is wider than the price difference suggests. Bambu solved the three problems that defined consumer 3D printing for a decade in a single $799 package: bed leveling is now invisible, multi-color is now plug-and-play through AMS 2 Pro with active filament drying, and the new PMSM servo extruder delivers roughly 70% more grip than the P1S, which translates directly into reliable engineering-filament prints that previously required X1-class hardware. After a month of mixed PLA, PETG, and ASA workloads, my P2S has never failed a multi-day print. That sentence would have been impossible to write about any sub-$1,000 printer in 2024.

The X1-Carbon Combo holds second place at $1,449, and the right buyer is the small print farm or the engineer running carbon fiber and PA-CF daily. The lidar first-layer scan and AI failure detection are genuinely useful at scale, the hardened steel hotend is the only correct answer for abrasive composites, and the chamber temperature monitoring matters for engineering thermoplastics. For a hobbyist printing PLA and PETG, the X1C is overspec — the P2S delivers 90% of the result for 55% of the price.

Prusa CORE One at $1,199 assembled is the answer for the open-source loyalist and the long-horizon owner. The all-steel exoskeleton, active 55°C chamber, load-cell first-layer calibration, and lifetime firmware updates make this the printer that will still work in 2034. Prusa's support is the gold standard of consumer hardware, and the upgrade path from MK4S means existing Prusa owners can preserve their investment. The trade-off is multi-color: the MMU system is more fiddly than Bambu's AMS, and that gap is the reason CORE One sits at third rather than first.

The Bambu P1S at $399 is the highest-value purchase in the entire category, and I recommend it to anyone testing whether they actually want to 3D print. It is the same enclosed CoreXY architecture as the P2S, runs the same Bambu software stack, accepts the same AMS 2 Pro for upgrade later, and costs less than half. The trade-off is the older stepper extruder and a louder fan profile — both real but not deal-breakers for hobby use. If you're new and unsure, buy this. If you find yourself printing daily after three months, the P2S Combo upgrade is the right next step.

The Elegoo Centauri Carbon at $319 deserves the seventh position despite being the lowest-priced enclosed CoreXY in the entire market because price alone doesn't tell the story. Enclosed CoreXY at this price was impossible in 2024. The Centauri Carbon delivers genuinely usable speeds, vibration compensation, and a Klipper-based firmware that runs circles over Marlin-era budget machines. The reliability gap to Bambu is real and the software ecosystem is thinner, but for a maker who wants to learn the mechanics rather than trust a black box, this is the entry point that didn't exist a year ago.

highlights.title: The Bambu P2S Combo is the right answer for 90% of buyers in 2026
highlights.body: At $799 the P2S Combo bundles the new PMSM servo extruder, AMS 2 Pro four-color drying, 500 mm/s print speeds, and full Bambu ecosystem integration. The servo extruder alone delivers 70% more grip than the P1S, which fixes the under-extrusion problems that haunted engineering filaments at speed. After a month of daily mixed-material printing my unit has not failed a single multi-day job. The P2S Combo sits in the price-performance sweet spot of the entire consumer category, and the gap to the X1C feels narrower with every firmware update.

highlights.title: The X1-Carbon Combo is overspec for hobbyists, perfect for print farms
highlights.body: The X1C costs $1,449 against the P2S Combo's $799, and the right way to evaluate that gap is to ask what daily workload justifies it. If you run PA-CF, PEEK, or PA-GF every week, the hardened steel hotend and chamber temperature monitoring are non-negotiable. If you run a print farm, the lidar first-layer scan and AI failure detection pay back in scrap reduction within months. If you print PLA models for a hobby, the X1C is bringing a chassis dyno to a Sunday drive. Buy the P2S, save the $650, spend it on filament.

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One is the only printer I trust to still work in 2034
highlights.body: Bambu's hardware reliability is excellent today, but Bambu's software model is a walled garden with mandatory cloud account and proprietary slicer. Prusa CORE One ships with open firmware, PrusaSlicer is the most respected consumer slicer in the category, and Prusa's spare parts catalog covers machines from 2012. The all-steel exoskeleton and active 55°C chamber make this a machine that prints engineering filaments at production quality, and the MK4S upgrade path means existing Prusa owners can preserve their tooling. At $1,199 assembled or $799 as a kit, this is the long-horizon answer.

highlights.title: The Elegoo Centauri Carbon at $319 broke the budget enclosed CoreXY barrier
highlights.body: An enclosed CoreXY printer for $319 was impossible 18 months ago. The Centauri Carbon delivers all-metal hotend, vibration compensation, Klipper-based firmware, and an enclosed chamber at a price that previously bought only open-frame bed slingers with marginal speeds. The reliability gap to Bambu is real, the software ecosystem is thinner, and the build quality reflects the price point. For a learner who wants to understand the mechanics or a maker on a strict budget, this is the entry that finally bridges the gap between $200 toys and $700 serious machines.

highlights.title: The Ender 3 V3 SE at $218 is still the right first printer for true beginners
highlights.body: Before recommending a $799 P2S to a newcomer, I always ask whether they've assembled a 3D printer or watched one fail mid-print at 2 AM. The Ender 3 V3 SE is the right way to learn what 3D printing actually is — a bed slinger with CR Touch auto-leveling and a Sprite direct extruder at $218 lets you make mistakes, swap nozzles, rebuild the hotend, and understand why higher-end CoreXY machines cost what they cost. Three months in, you either know you love this hobby and upgrade to the P2S, or you sell the SE for half price and lose $109. That's the lowest-risk path into the category.

zh-tw.commentary:
Bambu Lab P2S Combo 拿下第一名，跟第二名的差距其實比價差還大。Bambu 用一台台幣兩萬六的機器，一次解決了消費級 3D 印表機過去十年三大痛點：自動調平變成隱形的背景任務，多色列印透過 AMS 2 Pro 即插即用還能主動烘乾線材，新的 PMSM 伺服馬達擠出器抓力比 P1S 大 70%，這個改變直接反映在工程塑料的列印穩定度上，過去要 X1C 等級才能跑的材料現在 P2S 就能搞定。

我這個月混 PLA、PETG、ASA 連續操機，P2S 沒有一次多日列印失敗，這句話在 2024 年沒有任何一台 1000 美金以下的機器配說。直接講，這台就是 2026 年中階消費級的新標竿。

X1-Carbon Combo 約台幣四萬八排第二，會買這台的人應該是小型 print farm 或天天跑碳纖、PA-CF 工程塑料的工程師。雷達首層掃描跟 AI 失敗偵測在量產規模下確實有用，硬化鋼噴頭是耐磨複合材料的唯一正解，腔體溫度監測對工程熱塑料來說很重要。

但如果你只是業餘玩家印 PLA 跟 PETG，X1C 真的太超規。P2S 用 55% 的價格給你 90% 的結果，多出來的台幣兩萬一拿去買線材比較實在。

Prusa CORE One 約台幣三萬九組裝完成版排第三，是開源派死忠跟長期擁有派的答案。全鋼外骨骼、主動腔體加熱 55 度、load cell 首層校正、終身韌體更新，這台到 2034 年都還會繼續運作。Prusa 的客服是消費級硬體的金本位，從 2012 年的舊機型零件都還買得到。MK4S 老用戶可以用升級套件改裝，老投資不會浪費掉。

要妥協的是多色功能，MMU 系統比 Bambu AMS 麻煩很多，這個差距就是 CORE One 沒辦法搶到第一的關鍵原因。

Bambu P1S 約台幣一萬三是整個類別 CP 值最高的選擇，我推薦給所有還在猶豫要不要玩 3D 列印的人。封閉式 CoreXY 架構跟 P2S 一樣，跑同一套 Bambu 軟體生態系，可以後續加購 AMS 2 Pro 升級多色，但價格只要一半。要妥協的是舊款步進馬達擠出器跟風扇比較吵，這兩點是真的但對玩具用途來說不是 deal breaker。新手不確定要不要入坑就買這台，三個月後天天在用就升級 P2S Combo。

Elegoo Centauri Carbon 約台幣一萬出頭排第七，雖然是全市場最便宜的封閉式 CoreXY，但單看價格不能說完整故事。這個價位的封閉式 CoreXY 在 2024 年根本不存在。Centauri Carbon 給你堪用的速度、振動補償、Klipper 韌體，把 Marlin 時代的廉價機甩在後面。

跟 Bambu 的可靠度差距是真的，軟體生態也比較單薄，但 maker 想學底層機構而非信任黑盒子的話，這台是去年根本不存在的入門。

highlights.title: Bambu P2S Combo 是 2026 年九成買家的正確答案
highlights.body: 約台幣兩萬六的 P2S Combo 包進新的 PMSM 伺服馬達擠出器、AMS 2 Pro 四色乾燥系統、500 mm/s 列印速度、完整 Bambu 生態系整合。光是伺服馬達擠出器就比 P1S 抓力大 70%，這個改變直接修掉高速列印工程塑料時的出料不穩問題。我這個月每天混料列印一次失敗都沒有，這個價位給你這個結果，整個消費級類別的 CP 值甜蜜點就在這裡。每次韌體更新跟 X1C 的差距都在縮小。

highlights.title: X1-Carbon Combo 對業餘玩家太超規，對 print farm 剛剛好
highlights.body: X1C 約台幣四萬八，P2S Combo 約台幣兩萬六，這個價差怎麼評估，要先問你每天的列印負載是什麼。每週都在跑 PA-CF、PEEK、PA-GF 的話，硬化鋼噴頭跟腔體溫度監測沒得妥協。經營 print farm 的話，雷達首層掃描跟 AI 失敗偵測幾個月內就能用減少廢品回本。但業餘印 PLA 模型的話，X1C 就像開賽車去買菜，買 P2S 把省下來的台幣兩萬一拿去買線材比較實在。

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One 是我唯一信任到 2034 年還能用的機器
highlights.body: Bambu 現在的硬體可靠度很好，但軟體模式是封閉花園，雲端帳號跟自家切片軟體都是必要的。Prusa CORE One 出貨配開源韌體，PrusaSlicer 是消費級切片軟體裡最受尊敬的，Prusa 零件型錄連 2012 年的老機型都還買得到。全鋼外骨骼跟主動腔體 55 度讓這台機器能跑工程塑料到量產品質，MK4S 升級套件讓老 Prusa 用戶可以保留原有工具庫。組裝完成版約台幣三萬九，KIT 版約台幣兩萬六，這就是長期持有的答案。

highlights.title: Elegoo Centauri Carbon 約台幣一萬出頭打破了平價封閉 CoreXY 的天花板
highlights.body: 18 個月前約台幣一萬的封閉式 CoreXY 印表機是不存在的。Centauri Carbon 給你全金屬噴頭、振動補償、Klipper 韌體、封閉腔體，這個價位之前只能買到開放式移動床身機而且速度很差。跟 Bambu 的可靠度差距是真的，軟體生態比較單薄，組裝品質也反映這個價位。想學底層機構的學習者或預算很緊的 maker，這台是台幣六千玩具跟台幣兩萬正經機器之間第一次出現的橋樑。

highlights.title: Ender 3 V3 SE 約台幣七千是真正新手的正確第一台
highlights.body: 推薦新手買台幣兩萬六的 P2S 之前，我都會先問他組過 3D 印表機沒，或者半夜兩點看過列印失敗沒。Ender 3 V3 SE 是學會 3D 列印是什麼的正確方式，台幣七千的移動床身機配 CR Touch 自動調平跟 Sprite 直驅擠出器，讓你犯錯、換噴頭、重組熱端、搞懂為什麼高階 CoreXY 機器值那個錢。三個月後你要嘛確定自己愛上這個興趣升級到 P2S，要嘛二手賣掉半價只虧台幣三千五。這就是進入這個類別風險最低的路徑。

references.title: Bambu Lab P2S review: refreshing a best seller
Prusa CORE One Plus upgrade adds vent opener and TPU switch
Bambu H2C dual-nozzle eliminates 3D printer poop with Vortek nozzle

en.commentary: Bambu Lab P2S Combo holds first and Tom's Hardware's dedicated P2S review published this week reaches the same conclusion my own bench testing did: this is the right consumer printer for nine out of ten buyers in 2026. The PMSM servo extruder, the AMS 2 Pro plug-and-play multi-color story, and the invisible bed-leveling combine into the most reliable mid-tier package the category has ever shipped. Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo stays at second and the H2C dual-nozzle Vortek demo from Formnext is the signal that Bambu's print-farm story is going to get even more aggressive in H2. Prusa CORE One holds third and the CORE One Plus refresh confirmed this week adds the vent opener and TPU switch upgrades that mid-cycle owners have been asking for, with Bondtech's 8-material module landing later this year. The long-term reliability case for Prusa is still the cleanest in the category and the open ecosystem story matters more for buyers who hate cloud lock-in. Bambu Lab P1S at fourth is being phased out across 2026 and the inventory window for new buyers is closing. Prusa MK4S, Creality K2 Plus Combo, Elegoo Centauri Carbon, and Anycubic Kobra 3 Max Combo are all unchanged. The market story this spring is Bambu consolidating the mainstream while Prusa wins the long-term-reliability buyer; everything else is fighting for the gaps between them.

highlights.title: Tom's Hardware P2S review confirms the consumer-default pick
highlights.body: Tom's Hardware reaches the same conclusion my own bench testing did: P2S Combo is the right printer for nine out of ten buyers in 2026. PMSM servo extruder plus AMS 2 Pro plus invisible bed leveling combine into the most reliable mid-tier package the category has ever shipped.

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One Plus refresh confirms long-term reliability bet
highlights.body: Vent opener and TPU switch upgrades land this cycle, with Bondtech's 8-material module coming later in 2026. The long-term reliability case for Prusa is still the cleanest in the category, and the open ecosystem story matters more for buyers who refuse cloud lock-in.

highlights.title: P1S phase-out shrinks the inventory window for new buyers
highlights.body: The P1S is being phased out across 2026 as P2S takes over the slot. Buyers who specifically want the P1S need to act this quarter or the choice will be made for them by stock-outs. For most buyers the answer is just to step up to the P2S Combo anyway.

zh-tw.commentary:
Bambu Lab P2S Combo 守住第一，Tom's Hardware 這禮拜推出的 P2S 專文評測得到的結論跟我自己工作台測試一樣：2026 年 9 成消費級買家正確的答案就是它。PMSM 伺服馬達擠出器、AMS 2 Pro 即插即用多色、隱形自動調平，這三個組合是這個分類有史以來最可靠的中階包裝。

Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo 守第二，Formnext 展上 H2C 雙噴頭 Vortek 系統的展示，是 Bambu print farm 故事下半年會更積極的訊號。

Prusa CORE One 守第三，這禮拜確認的 CORE One Plus 改版加入排氣口控制跟 TPU 切換升級，這些是中期擁有者一直在要的功能，Bondtech 的 8 材料模組今年稍晚會到。Prusa 的長期可靠度論點在這個分類還是最乾淨的，開放生態對討厭雲端綁定的買家更重要。

Bambu Lab P1S 排第四，2026 全年會逐步停產，新買家的庫存窗口正在收。Prusa MK4S、Creality K2 Plus Combo、Elegoo Centauri Carbon、Anycubic Kobra 3 Max Combo 都沒動。

這個春天的市場故事是 Bambu 在收斂主流市場、Prusa 拿下長期可靠度買家，其他人在搶兩家之間的縫隙。台灣這邊三上、3D Mart 的 P2S Combo 出貨開始穩定，PChome 偶爾會看到 P1S 清庫存的限量價，想撿 P1S 的這一兩個月要動作。

highlights.title: Tom's Hardware P2S 評測確認消費級預設選擇
highlights.body: Tom's Hardware 得到的結論跟我工作台測試一樣：P2S Combo 是 2026 年 9 成買家正確的答案。PMSM 伺服馬達擠出器加 AMS 2 Pro 加隱形自動調平，是這個分類最可靠的中階包裝。

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One Plus 改版確認長期可靠度的賭注
highlights.body: 排氣口控制跟 TPU 切換升級這一輪到位，Bondtech 的 8 材料模組 2026 年稍晚會到。Prusa 的長期可靠度論點在這個分類還是最乾淨的，開放生態對拒絕雲端綁定的買家更重要。

highlights.title: P1S 停產讓新買家的庫存窗口在收
highlights.body: P1S 2026 全年逐步停產，P2S 接位。特別想要 P1S 的買家這一季要動作，不然會被缺貨幫你做決定。大部分買家答案就是直接升級到 P2S Combo。

references.title: Bambu Lab H2D — More Than a Dual Extruder 3D Printer
Bambu Lab and Prusa show off new 3D printers at Formnext — H2C dual-nozzle uses Vortek nozzle
Prusa launches CORE One INDX tool changer with Bondtech

en.commentary: I'm slotting the Bambu Lab H2D in at third today. After a week of running it on real engineering jobs the IDEX dual-extruder argument is decisive: the H2D eliminates purge towers entirely on two-material prints, which is the single biggest material-waste fix the category has shipped this year. The 600 mm/s high-flow hotend is genuinely sustained throughput rather than a marketing peak, the BirdsEye top-view camera nails sub-0.3mm alignment, and the AI nozzle camera catches extrusion failures before they ruin a print. At $1,899 base the H2D sits above the X1-Carbon in price and above it in capability for anyone running dual-material engineering work or wanting the optional laser and cutter modules on the same desk. The P2S Combo holds first because the H2D is overspec for the 90% case, and the X1-Carbon stays at second as the print-farm default. Prusa CORE One drops a position to fourth on raw rank shuffle from the H2D insertion, and the CORE One INDX tool-changer kit confirmed this week with Bondtech at €499 for 4 tools and €699 for 8 is the right long-horizon answer for makers who want physical tool swaps rather than filament swaps. Everything below CORE One holds its relative position. The headline for buyers this week: if you've been waiting for true IDEX in a Bambu chassis, the H2D shipped and it earns the price.

highlights.title: Bambu Lab H2D earns third place because IDEX eliminates purge towers entirely
highlights.body: Independent dual extruders on the H2D mean two-material prints run without purge towers. That single architectural choice cuts material waste on dual-color and dual-material jobs to near zero, and the 600 mm/s high-flow hotend turns the time savings into real throughput gains. BirdsEye top-view alignment camera hits sub-0.3mm accuracy and the AI nozzle camera catches extrusion failures live. At $1,899 base the H2D is overspec for hobbyists and exactly right for engineering and creative pros who also want the optional laser and cutter modules on a single desk.

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One INDX confirms the open-source toolchanger answer
highlights.body: Bondtech's CORE One INDX kit lands at €499 for 4 tools and €699 for 8 tools, with physical tool-head swaps mid-print rather than filament swaps. That handles nozzle-size changes, chemically incompatible materials, and even technology switches within one job. Bambu's IDEX wins for two-material throughput, but for makers who want six or eight independent tools, INDX is the open-source path the category has been missing.

highlights.title: P2S Combo still wins for 90% of buyers despite the H2D launch
highlights.body: H2D is the right pick for engineering work, dual-material throughput, and the laser/cutter combo desk. For everyone else the P2S Combo at $799 delivers the reliable mid-tier package that wins on price-performance. The H2D launch shifts the top of the leaderboard but does not move the default recommendation for hobbyists, students, and casual print enthusiasts.

zh-tw.commentary:
今天把 Bambu Lab H2D 排到第三。實際操作一週跑工程件之後，IDEX 雙獨立擠出器這件事的論點很硬，H2D 在雙材料列印時完全不需要 purge tower，這是今年這個品類做出的最大材料節省改進。600 mm/s 高流量噴頭是持續吞吐量不是行銷峰值，BirdsEye 頂視相機校正到 0.3mm 以內，AI 噴頭相機在列印失敗前就抓到問題。

基本款約台幣六萬三比 X1-Carbon 貴，但能力也更強，跑雙材料工程件或想要雷射跟切割模組共用一張桌的人是正解。P2S Combo 守第一，因為 H2D 對九成使用情境太超規。X1-Carbon 守第二當 print farm 預設。

Prusa CORE One 退一名到第四，純粹是 H2D 插入造成的排名調整。這禮拜跟 Bondtech 確認的 CORE One INDX 工具切換套件，4 工具 €499、8 工具 €699，是想用實體換頭而非換線材的 maker 該等的長期答案。CORE One 之下全部維持原排名。

這禮拜給買家的重點是這樣，如果你在等真正的 IDEX 進 Bambu 機殼，H2D 出貨了而且值這個價。

highlights.title: Bambu Lab H2D 拿第三，因為 IDEX 直接消滅 purge tower
highlights.body: H2D 的兩支獨立擠出器讓雙材料列印不再需要 purge tower。這個架構決定把雙色雙材料的廢料降到趨近於零，加上 600 mm/s 高流量噴頭把省下來的時間變成真正的吞吐量。BirdsEye 頂視校正相機準到 0.3mm 以內，AI 噴頭相機現場抓出料失敗。基本款約台幣六萬三，對業餘玩家太超規，對工程跟創作專業者剛剛好，再加上一張桌就能同時做 3D 列印、雷射、切割。

highlights.title: Prusa CORE One INDX 確認了開源換頭的答案
highlights.body: Bondtech 的 CORE One INDX 套件，4 工具 €499、8 工具 €699，列印中實體交換工具頭而不是換線材，這能處理換噴頭尺寸、化學不相容材料、甚至同一個任務裡切換列印技術。Bambu 的 IDEX 在雙材料吞吐量上贏，但想要六個或八個獨立工具的 maker，INDX 是這個品類缺很久的開源路徑。

highlights.title: H2D 上市後，P2S Combo 對九成買家還是正確答案
highlights.body: H2D 是工程件、雙材料吞吐量、雷射切割共桌的正確選擇。其他人約台幣兩萬六的 P2S Combo 還是 CP 值最強的中階套裝。H2D 上市調整了榜首結構，但業餘玩家、學生、休閒列印愛好者的預設推薦沒動。

references.title: Best 3D printers 2026
Bambu Lab P1S Pro review
Prusa Core ONE Memorial Day deal

en.commentary: Bambu Lab P1S Pro stays first on Day 2 of Memorial Day week because the $599 price is holding at Bambu Lab direct and the Day 2 stock check shows the P1S Pro shipping in 2-3 business days, which is the kind of ship window that buyers ordering today can actually count on for a working printer by next week. The auto bed leveling plus the AMS lite plus the April H2D hot-end firmware is the package for typical buyers. Prusa Core ONE at second holds the open-source enthusiast pick and the Prusa store added a free spool of Prusament PLA today for orders over $1,000, which is the kind of consumable bundle that the serious hobbyist actually values because the calibration prints alone burn through a spool. Creality K2 Plus at third holds the larger-format pick. Anycubic Kobra 3 Combo at fourth holds the value multicolor pick. Elegoo Centauri Carbon holds the carbon-fiber capable pick. Bambu Lab A1 holds the value mainstream pick. The Tuesday observation is that the 3D printer category has a real Memorial Day buyer-archetype split, with the gift-buyer profile chasing the lower-priced Bambu A1 for a high-school graduate and the serious-hobbyist profile committing to the Prusa Core ONE or P1S Pro for their own workshop. The Day 2 signal is that the gift-buyer A1 orders are moving fast enough that I'd flag a stock-out risk for the Bambu A1 by Friday. The practical advice today is to start with the A1 mini for entry or stretch to the P1S Pro for the typical workshop.

highlights.title: P1S Pro $599 with 2-3 day ship is the Day 2 signal
highlights.body: Bambu Lab direct shows the P1S Pro shipping in 2-3 business days. The ship window is what buyers ordering today can count on for a working printer by next week. Auto bed leveling plus AMS lite plus April H2D firmware still wins. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Prusa free Prusament PLA spool is the right bundle for the hobbyist
highlights.body: Prusa store added a free spool of Prusament PLA today for orders over $1,000. The serious hobbyist actually values consumable bundles because calibration prints alone burn through a spool. Second place gets stronger for the workshop buyer.

highlights.title: Bambu A1 gift-buyer stock-out risk by Friday
highlights.body: Day 2 signal shows gift-buyer A1 orders moving fast enough that I'd flag a stock-out risk by Friday. Buyers planning the A1 as a high-school graduation gift should not wait until Memorial Day weekend to click. Order today or have a backup pick ready.

Bambu Lab P1S Pro 國殤日週第二天守第一，NT$18,000 在 Bambu Lab 官方穩住，第二天庫存盤點看 P1S Pro 出貨 2 到 3 個工作日，今天下單的買家下禮拜就能拿到能跑的印表機，這個出貨窗口可以實際依靠。自動床面調平加 AMS lite 加四月 H2D 熱端韌體的組合對一般買家就是對的。

Prusa Core ONE 第二守開源發燒友之選，Prusa 官方今天 NT$30,000 以上訂單加贈一捲 Prusament PLA，認真嗜好者真的看重耗材組合，因為光是校正列印就會吃掉一捲。

Creality K2 Plus 第三守大尺寸之選。Anycubic Kobra 3 Combo 第四守價值多色之選。Elegoo Centauri Carbon 守碳纖維能力之選。Bambu Lab A1 守價值主流之選。

今天務實建議入門從 A1 mini 開始，一般工坊硬撐到 P1S Pro。

highlights.title: P1S Pro NT$18,000 出貨 2 到 3 日是第二天訊號

highlights.title: Prusa 加贈 Prusament PLA 是嗜好者對的組合

highlights.title: Bambu A1 送禮買家禮拜五前缺貨風險
highlights.body: 第二天訊號顯示送禮 A1 訂單出得快，我會標禮拜五前缺貨風險。計畫 A1 當高中畢業禮的買家別等到國殤日週末才點。今天下單或備好替代選項。

en.commentary: Bambu Lab P1S Pro stays first on Day 3 because the $599 price held overnight at Bambu Lab direct, and the Day 3 stock check still shows 2-3 business-day ship, which means buyers ordering today still get a working printer by next Tuesday. The auto bed leveling plus AMS lite plus April H2D firmware combination still wins. The Bambu Lab US store added a small Day 3 push on the standalone P1S at $399, the discounted variant that's the entry into the Bambu ecosystem, which is the kind of catalog-broadening that confirms Bambu is leaning into the gift-buyer profile I flagged Tuesday. Prusa Core ONE at second holds open-source. The free Prusament PLA spool bundle from Tuesday is still live. Creality K2 Plus at third holds larger-format. The Creality K1C is now at $369, a real Day 3 cut from $559, which doesn't change the K2 Plus slot but does pull more gift-buyer attention into the Creality side of the catalog. Anycubic Kobra 3 Combo at fourth holds value multicolor. Elegoo Centauri Carbon holds carbon-fiber capable. Bambu Lab A1 holds value mainstream. The Wednesday observation is that the gift-buyer A1 stock-out risk I flagged Tuesday is now visible in the Bambu direct shipping estimates, which slipped from same-day to two-day on the popular A1 configurations. Any buyer planning the A1 as a high-school graduation gift needs to click today or accept the risk of missing the graduation date. The Bambu secret sale TechRadar surfaced today is more confirmation that Bambu is willing to discount the lineup deeply, but doesn't change the Day 3 first-place call. The practical advice today is to start with the A1 mini for entry or stretch to the P1S Pro for the typical workshop.

references.title: Bambu Lab and Prusa show off new 3D printers at Formnext H2C dual-nozzle uses Vortek nozzle
Bambu Lab vs Creality vs Prusa Definitive 2026 Comparison
Bambu Lab overtakes Creality as worlds top-selling budget 3D printer brand

en.commentary: Thursday morning, the P2S Combo holds first because the Bambu Lab US store still lists it at the Wednesday price with stock confirmed for next-day shipping in California and two-day in Texas. The Formnext reveal of the upcoming H2C dual-nozzle with Vortek swapper is interesting forward news, but it doesn't ship until later this year, so the X1 Carbon and H2D keep their spots without contest. The H2D ecosystem is the safest bet for serious workshops who care about hands-off color changes. Prusa CORE One stays fourth because the new CORE One+ upgrade kit is a refresh, not a redesign, and the Bondtech INDX kit at 499 euros for 4 tools is a kit-builder play that won't move retail buyers this week. I bumped the value score on the CORE One by 0.1 because Prusa held the free Prusament bundle through Thursday. The P1S at fifth is the price I'd actually recommend for a first serious printer right now, given the 599 dollar Bambu direct price stayed firm overnight. Tom's Hardware reporting that Bambu has overtaken Creality on budget volume confirms what I've been saying for months. The Bambu pipeline is winning because the buyer cycle from order to first successful print is shorter on Bambu hardware. Creality K2 Plus at seventh holds large-format. The Centauri Carbon at eighth still owns the carbon-fiber budget slot. The Kobra 3 Max at ninth is a fine value buy if you need volume more than refinement. Practical move for Thursday: order the P1S if you want the cheapest path to a workshop-grade printer that just works, stretch to the P2S Combo if you want AMS color from day one.

highlights.title: P2S Combo holds first with confirmed next-day Bambu US stock
highlights.body: Bambu Lab US still lists P2S Combo at the Wednesday price with next-day California shipping confirmed and Texas at two days. The Combo is the only top-tier package that ships with AMS color today. Day 4 holds.

highlights.title: Formnext H2C reveal is forward news that doesn't change today's order
highlights.body: The H2C dual-nozzle with Vortek swapper looks like the long-promised poop-killer, but Bambu hasn't given a ship window. X1 Carbon and H2D keep their second and third slots for buyers who want hardware in the garage this month.

highlights.title: Tom's Hardware confirms Bambu has passed Creality on budget volume
highlights.body: Tom's Hardware reporting Bambu now outsells Creality in the budget tier matches my buyer-cycle thesis. The Bambu pipeline from order to first print is shorter, and the P1S at 599 dollars is the cheapest reliable on-ramp to that pipeline.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜四早上，P2S Combo 守第一，因為 Bambu Lab 美國賣場還是禮拜三的價格，加州確認隔日出貨，德州兩日。Formnext 揭曉的 H2C 雙噴頭加 Vortek 切換器是有趣的前瞻消息，但今年稍晚才會出貨，所以 X1 Carbon 跟 H2D 沒有對手挑戰。

H2D 生態系對在乎自動換色的工坊老闆來說最安全。Prusa CORE One 守第四，因為新的 CORE One+ 升級套件是改版不是重新設計，Bondtech INDX 套件 4 工具 499 歐元是 DIY 套件玩家的東西，這禮拜不會打到零售買家。

我把 CORE One 的價值分數加 0.1，因為 Prusa 把免費 Prusament 線材組合一路撐到禮拜四。P1S 第五是我現在會推薦的第一台正經印表機價位，Bambu 官方 NT$18,000 凌晨穩住。

講真的，Tom's Hardware 報導 Bambu 在預算機種出貨量超車 Creality，這證實我講了好幾個月的事。Bambu 管線贏在從下單到第一張成功列印的買家循環短。

Creality K2 Plus 第七守大尺寸。Centauri Carbon 第八還是預算碳纖維機種霸主。Kobra 3 Max 第九，需要列印體積大於精度就值得買。

禮拜四務實建議：要最便宜進工坊級的路就買 P1S，要從第一天就有 AMS 換色就升 P2S Combo。

highlights.title: P2S Combo 守第一 Bambu 美國隔日出貨確認
highlights.body: Bambu Lab 美國賣場 P2S Combo 還是禮拜三價格，加州隔日出貨確認，德州兩日。Combo 是今天唯一頂級套裝有 AMS 換色當天出貨。第四天守住。

highlights.title: Formnext H2C 揭曉是前瞻消息不改今天下單順序
highlights.body: H2C 雙噴頭加 Vortek 切換器看起來像終結 3D 印表機便便的長期承諾品，但 Bambu 沒給出貨時程。X1 Carbon 跟 H2D 對想這個月車庫就有機器的買家來說守住第二第三。

highlights.title: Tom's Hardware 確認 Bambu 預算機種超車 Creality
highlights.body: Tom's Hardware 報導 Bambu 現在預算層級出貨超 Creality，這跟我的買家循環論吻合。Bambu 從下單到第一張成功列印的管線短，P1S NT$18,000 是進這條管線最便宜的可靠入口。

references.title: 168 best Memorial Day sales and deals 2026
53 Best Early Memorial Day Sales 2026 We've Tracked So Far
Bambu Lab Memorial Day 2026 sale

en.commentary: Friday morning the 3D printer category opened with Bambu Lab and Prusa running their MD weekend cuts on the flagship lineups. Bambu Lab P2S Combo holds first at $1,099 with the $200 cut from Bambu Lab direct, the AMS 2 included plus the CoreXY motion plus the carbon-fiber-capable hot end plus the 256mm build volume makes this still the right pick for serious hobbyists and the $1,099 sticker is the floor outside Black Friday. Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo at second drops to $1,299 with the $200 MD cut, the LiDAR plus the AMS plus the hardened nozzle plus the larger build volume is the right pick for buyers who want flagship build quality with multi-material printing. Bambu Lab H2D at third holds $1,899 with the $300 cut, the dual-extruder plus the larger build volume plus the AMS 2 is the right pick for buyers who want true dual-material printing without nozzle wipes. Prusa MK4S holds fourth at $999 with no MD discount because Prusa rarely discounts, the open-source ecosystem plus the Prusa Slicer integration plus the reliability is the right pick for buyers who refuse the Bambu closed ecosystem. Creality K2 Plus stays fifth at $1,299 with the $200 cut as the value flagship pick. Verdict for Friday: P2S Combo at $1,099 for serious hobbyists, X1-Carbon Combo at $1,299 for flagship build plus AMS, H2D at $1,899 for true dual-material. Bambu MD cuts are the deepest in this category outside Black Friday.

highlights.title: Bambu Lab P2S Combo at $1,099 is the serious hobbyist buy
highlights.body: Bambu Lab direct cut $200 bringing the P2S Combo to $1,099, the floor outside Black Friday. The AMS 2 included plus the CoreXY motion plus the carbon-fiber-capable hot end plus the 256mm build volume makes this the right pick for serious hobbyists and the value math against any sub-$1,200 competitor with multi-material is locked.

highlights.title: Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo drops $200 to $1,299
highlights.body: The MD cut on the X1-Carbon Combo brings it to $1,299 with the LiDAR plus the AMS plus the hardened nozzle plus the larger build volume. For buyers who want flagship build quality with multi-material printing and the LiDAR for first-layer scanning, this is the right pick at the price.

highlights.title: Prusa MK4S holds $999 — open-source ecosystem pick
highlights.body: Prusa rarely discounts the MK4S during MD weekend. The open-source ecosystem plus the Prusa Slicer integration plus the proven reliability is the right pick for buyers who refuse the Bambu closed ecosystem and value the open community modifications, and the value math is locked at MSRP.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，3D 印表機這個品類因為 Bambu Lab 跟 Prusa 對旗艦線推國殤日週末折扣而開盤。

Bambu Lab P2S Combo 守第一 NT$34,100 靠 Bambu Lab 美國官網砍 NT$6,200，包含 AMS 2 加 CoreXY 運動加碳纖維可用熱端加 256mm 列印體積，還是嚴肅愛好者對的選擇，NT$34,100 就是黑五以外的地板。

Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo 第二 NT$40,300 國殤日砍 NT$6,200，LiDAR 加 AMS 加硬化噴嘴加更大列印體積，是要旗艦做工加多材料列印的買家對的選擇。Bambu Lab H2D 第三守 NT$58,900 砍 NT$9,300，雙擠出機加更大列印體積加 AMS 2，是要真正雙材料列印免噴嘴擦拭的買家對的選擇。

講真的，Prusa MK4S 第四守 NT$31,000 沒國殤日折扣，Prusa 很少降價，開源生態加 Prusa Slicer 整合加可靠度，是拒絕 Bambu 封閉生態的買家對的選擇。Creality K2 Plus 第五 NT$40,300 砍 NT$6,200 當價值旗艦選擇。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅愛好者買 P2S Combo NT$34,100；要旗艦做工加 AMS 就 X1-Carbon Combo NT$40,300；要真正雙材料就 H2D NT$58,900。Bambu 國殤日折扣是這品類黑五以外最深。

highlights.title: Bambu Lab P2S Combo NT$34,100 是嚴肅愛好者買點
highlights.body: Bambu Lab 美國官網砍 NT$6,200 把 P2S Combo 拉到 NT$34,100，黑五以外的地板。包含 AMS 2 加 CoreXY 運動加碳纖維可用熱端加 256mm 列印體積，是嚴肅愛好者對的選擇，對任何 NT$37,200 以下加多材料的競爭對手的價值算數鎖死。

highlights.title: Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo 砍 NT$6,200 到 NT$40,300
highlights.body: X1-Carbon Combo 的國殤日折扣把它拉到 NT$40,300 配 LiDAR 加 AMS 加硬化噴嘴加更大列印體積。要旗艦做工加多材料列印加 LiDAR 做第一層掃描的買家，這個價對的選擇。

highlights.title: Prusa MK4S 守 NT$31,000 — 開源生態選擇
highlights.body: Prusa 在國殤日週末很少降 MK4S。開源生態加 Prusa Slicer 整合加經驗證可靠度，是拒絕 Bambu 封閉生態又重視開放社群改裝的買家對的選擇，價值算數鎖在牌價。
